text: ↩️ Reply to ResistanceTrench mirror: "🇱🇧⚡️🇮🇱 The terrorist IOF Arabic spokesperson Avichay repeats IOF 'warning': “Southerners not to head home until further notice” 🚩 @RezistanceTrench1" 🇱🇧 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Joyful scenes in Beirut as brave people from southern Lebanon return home — cars honking, Hezbollah flags waving, and portraits of Sayyed Hassan Nasrallah held high.
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 ResistanceTrench 镜像：“🇱🇧⚡️🇮🇱 恐怖分子 IOF 阿拉伯语发言人阿维查伊（Avichay）重复了 IOF 的‘警告’：‘在另行通知前，南部居民不得回家’ 🚩 @RezistanceTrench1” 🇱🇧 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 贝鲁特出现欢乐场景，勇敢的黎巴嫩南部人民正在回家——汽车鸣笛，真主党旗帜飘扬，赛义德·哈桑·纳斯鲁拉的肖像被高高举起。

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Open Source Intel President Trump: “[Joe] Kent is a LOSER, just like Tucker, Candace, Megyn, and the rest of them are LOSERS — You're born that way, LOW IQ, and there's not a damn thing they're going to be able to do about it!” President Trump: “Who's dumber, Tucker Carlson or Joe Kent? It's very interesting! ! met Joe Kent at Dover Air Force Base, along with numerous others who had lost their loved ones in War. I said hello to all of the families. Kent, horribly, lost his wife. Her casket was being brought to Dover, along with the rest, although he married again, quite quickly, in my opinion. In any event, a number of years later, I noticed the same person was running for Congress in Washington State, and lost. I then noticed a couple of years later, he was running again, and lost. While I didn't know him other than our brief Dover encounter, but feeling sorry for him after the two Election losses, I told my people, "Hire him for the White House. Give him a job, make him feel good, he lost his wife and two Elections." They did so and, while I rarely saw him, I certainly didn't expect disloyalty, but that's what I got. He was really a SLEAZEBAG, and some would say, on top of it all, A LEAKER!! don't know whether or not that was true, but next time, NO MORE MR. NICE GUY! Kent is a LOSER, just like Tucker, Candace, Megyn, and the rest of them are LOSERS — You're born that way, LOW IQ, and there's not a damn thing they're going to be able to do about it! President DONALD J. TRUMP” - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Open Source Intel 特朗普总统：“[乔]·肯特（Joe Kent）是个失败者，就像塔克（Tucker）、坎迪斯（Candace）、梅根（Megyn）以及他们中的其他人一样，都是失败者——你们天生如此，智商低下，对此你们什么也做不了！” 特朗普总统：“谁更蠢，塔克·卡尔森（Tucker Carlson）还是乔·肯特？这很有趣！我在多佛空军基地见到了乔·肯特，还有许多在战争中失去亲人的人。我向所有家庭问好。肯特很不幸地失去了他的妻子。她的灵柩和其他人的灵柩一起被运往多佛，尽管在我看来，他很快就再婚了。无论如何，几年后，我注意到同一个人正在华盛顿州竞选国会议员，并失败了。我随后注意到几年后，他又参加竞选，又失败了。虽然除了在多佛的短暂相遇外我不认识他，但在他两次竞选失败后我为他感到难过，我告诉我的手下：‘雇佣他进白宫。给他一份工作，让他感觉好点，他失去了妻子和两次选举。’ 他们照做了，虽然我很少见到他，但我当然没料到他会不忠，但这正是我所得到的。他真是一个卑鄙小人，有些人甚至会说，最重要的是，他还是个泄密者！！我不知道这是否属实，但下次，别再指望我是个好人了！肯特是个失败者，就像塔克、坎迪斯、梅根以及他们中的其他人一样，都是失败者——你们天生如此，智商低下，对此你们什么也做不了！唐纳德·J·特朗普总统” - Open Source Intel 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Open Source Intel President Trump: “Who's dumber, Tucker Carlson or Joe Kent? It's very interesting! ! met Joe Kent at Dover Air Force Base, along with numerous others who had lost their loved ones in War. I said hello to all of the families. Kent, horribly, lost his wife. Her casket was being brought to Dover, along with the rest, although he married again, quite quickly, in my opinion. In any event, a number of years later, I noticed the same person was running for Congress in Washington State, and lost. I then noticed a couple of years later, he was running again, and lost. While I didn't know him other than our brief Dover encounter, but feeling sorry for him after the two Election losses, I told my people, "Hire him for the White House. Give him a job, make him feel good, he lost his wife and two Elections." They did so and, while I rarely saw him, I certainly didn't expect disloyalty, but that's what I got. He was really a SLEAZEBAG, and some would say, on top of it all, A LEAKER!! don't know whether or not that was true, but next time, NO MORE MR. NICE GUY! Kent is a LOSER, just like Tucker, Candace, Megyn, and the rest of them are LOSERS — You're born that way, LOW IQ, and there's not a damn thing they're going to be able to do about it! President DONALD J. TRUMP” tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Open Source Intel 特朗普总统：“谁更蠢，塔克·卡尔森还是乔·肯特？这很有趣！我在多佛空军基地见到了乔·肯特，还有许多在战争中失去亲人的人。我向所有家庭问好。肯特很不幸地失去了他的妻子。她的灵柩和其他人的灵柩一起被运往多佛，尽管在我看来，他很快就再婚了。无论如何，几年后，我注意到同一个人正在华盛顿州竞选国会议员，并失败了。我随后注意到几年后，他又参加竞选，又失败了。虽然除了在多佛的短暂相遇外我不认识他，但在他两次竞选失败后我为他感到难过，我告诉我的手下：‘雇佣他进白宫。给他一份工作，让他感觉好点，他失去了妻子和两次选举。’ 他们照做了，虽然我很少见到他，但我当然没料到他会不忠，但这正是我所得到的。他真是一个卑鄙小人，有些人甚至会说，最重要的是，他还是个泄密者！！我不知道这是否属实，但下次，别再指望我是个好人了！肯特是个失败者，就像塔克、坎迪斯、梅根以及他们中的其他人一样，都是失败者——你们天生如此，智商低下，对此你们什么也做不了！唐纳德·J·特朗普总统” 推文

text: Open Source Intel Images released by USA Today show meals recently served to sailors aboard the USS Abraham Lincoln aircraft carrier. Hopefully the ship makes a port visit soon and gets a proper resupply. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044910134506258808/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 《今日美国》发布的图片显示了最近在亚伯拉罕·林肯号航空母舰上为水手提供的餐食。希望该舰能尽快停靠港口并获得适当的补给。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044910134506258808/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel IDF to residents of southern Lebanon: Despite the ceasefire entering implementation, troops remain deployed due to continued Hezbollah activity. Civilians are urged not to move south of the Litani River until further notice for their safety. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 以色列国防军（IDF）致黎巴嫩南部居民：尽管停火协议已开始实施，但由于真主党的持续活动，部队仍保持部署状态。为安全起见，敦促平民在另行通知前不要前往利塔尼河以南地区。 推文

text: U.S. Central Command U.S. Marines from the 31st Marine Expeditionary Unit, and Sailors assigned to amphibious transport dock ship USS New Orleans (LPD 18) support blockade operations against Iran, April 16. U.S. forces are ready and postured to enforce the blockade. https://twitter.com/CENTCOM/status/2044906933967310995/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 美国中央司令部 来自第31海军陆战远征部队的美国海军陆战队员和被分配到两栖运输船坞舰“新奥尔良”号（LPD 18）上的水手们于4月16日支持针对伊朗的封锁行动。美军已做好准备并处于戒备状态以执行封锁。 https://twitter.com/CENTCOM/status/2044906933967310995/photo/1 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 An Israeli drone strike targeted a vehicle in the town of Haris, southern Lebanon. @wfwitness" ⚡ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 MTV: Following verification of an incident in the town of Haris, southern Lebanon initially reported as an Israeli strike on a vehicle, it was later confirmed that the explosion was caused by a war remnant. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 一架以色列无人机袭击了黎巴嫩南部哈里斯镇的一辆汽车。 @wfwitness” ⚡ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 MTV：在核实了黎巴嫩南部哈里斯镇最初被报道为以色列袭击车辆的事件后，后来证实爆炸是由战争遗留物引起的。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 🇺🇳 🇱🇧 UNIFIL and the Lebanese army were told by the IDF not to reopen the Qasmiyeh bridge to prevent civilians from returning to towns in southern Lebanon, particularly the Litani area. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench1
text_zh: 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 🇺🇳 🇱🇧 以色列国防军告知联合国驻黎巴嫩临时部队（UNIFIL）和黎巴嫩军队不要重新开放卡斯米耶（Qasmiyeh）大桥，以防止平民返回黎巴嫩南部城镇，特别是利塔尼地区。 🚩 @RezistanceTrench1

text: Al-Qasmiyeh: Locals take it into their own hands to open the road after the LAF's failure to do so since Israel ordered them not to.
text_zh: 卡斯米耶（Al-Qasmiyeh）：在黎巴嫩武装部队（LAF）未能采取行动后，当地人自行采取行动打开了道路，因为以色列命令他们不要这样做。

text: 🇱🇧 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Israeli forces had carried out an airstrike targeting the southern Lebanese town of Tyre moments before the ceasefire took effect.
text_zh: 🇱🇧 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 以色列军队在停火生效前片刻对黎巴嫩南部城市提尔（Tyre）进行了空袭。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇱🇧 The citizens of Beirut have called on the Lebanese army to arrest and stop the individuals responsible for the reckless gunfire and B7’s in Dahieh with reports of damages across car windows and injuries within the capital. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 The Lebanese army commander Radolf Haykal has released a statement on the reckless shooting in Dahieh: We will pursue those who fire weapons, arrest them, and refer them to the appropriate judicial authorities. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇱🇧 贝鲁特市民呼吁黎巴嫩军队逮捕并制止在达希耶（Dahieh）进行鲁莽枪击和使用B7火箭筒的肇事者，据报道首都多处汽车车窗受损并有人受伤。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 黎巴嫩军队指挥官拉多夫·海卡尔（Radolf Haykal）就达希耶的鲁莽枪击事件发表声明：我们将追捕开火者，将其逮捕，并移交相关司法部门处理。@wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Professor Marandi comments on the Lebanon-Israel ceasefire. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench1
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 马兰迪（Marandi）教授就黎巴嫩与以色列的停火发表评论。🚩 @RezistanceTrench1

text: The alleged airstrike and assassination in Abassyieh and Haris respectively were actually bomb remnants exploding. The video is from the aftermath of the explosion in Abassyieh.
text_zh: 在阿巴西亚（Abassyieh）和哈里斯（Haris）发生的所谓空袭和暗杀事件，实际上是炸弹残留物爆炸。该视频是阿巴西亚爆炸后的现场画面。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇺🇳🇮🇱 Reports that the UNIFIL and the Lebanese army have been informed by the IDF to not reopen/repair the Qasmiyeh bridge inorder to prevent civilians returning home particularly in the Litani area of southern Lebanon. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇺🇳 🇮🇱 Despite the warning received by the the IDF repair works has begun on the bridges targeted including the Qasmiyeh bridge. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇺🇳🇮🇱 据报道，以色列国防军（IDF）已通知联合国驻黎巴嫩临时部队（UNIFIL）和黎巴嫩军队不得重新开放或修复卡斯米耶（Qasmiyeh）大桥，以阻止平民返回家园，特别是黎巴嫩南部的利塔尼（Litani）地区。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇺🇳 🇮🇱 尽管收到了以色列国防军的警告，针对包括卡斯米耶大桥在内的受损桥梁的修复工作已经开始。@wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 Americans aboard the amphibious assault ship USS Tripoli complain of poor food quality and limited portions during a prolonged deployment near Iran. Strained supply lines have led to rationing and low morale, with families saying sailors are often hungry and unable to receive supplies due to postal disruptions.
text_zh: 🇺🇸 在两栖攻击舰“的黎波里”号（USS Tripoli）上的美国人抱怨在伊朗附近长期部署期间食物质量差且份量有限。紧张的补给线导致了配给制和士气低落，家属称水兵们经常挨饿，且由于邮政中断无法收到补给。

text: 🇱🇧 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Lebanese authorities reopen roads to Dahiyeh in southern Beirut as residents begin returning home. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench1
text_zh: 🇱🇧 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 随着居民开始返回家园，黎巴嫩当局重新开放了通往贝鲁特南部达希耶的道路。🚩 @RezistanceTrench1

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧 Damages reported across Beirut due to stray bullets hitting a vehicles and windows. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Additional footage of the celebratory gunfire over the skies of Dahieh filmed from Mount Lebanon. @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 🇱🇧 Violation : Less than 30 minutes after the ceasefire came into effect, Israeli forces fired artillery shells at villages it failed to capture and carried out demolitions of civilian homes in Bint Jbeil southern Lebanon. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench1
text_zh: 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 🇱🇧 违规：停火协议生效不到30分钟，以色列军队就向其未能占领的村庄发射了炮弹，并在黎巴嫩南部的宾特朱拜勒（Bint Jbeil）拆毁了平民住宅。🚩 @RezistanceTrench1

text: ↩️ Reply to Lebanese News and Updates: "Locals near the Qasmiye-Tyre costal bridge which was bombed earlier this week, ask the government to take action and repair the bridge so they could visit their homes in Tyre and nearby areas. The bridge, serviceable yesterday, was heavily bombed again today…" ❗️ Reports indicate that Israel ordered the LAF and UNIFIL not to repair the Qasmiyeh bridge and to prevent residents from crossing it to reach their homes. It goes without saying, but the way it was targeted by Israel before the ceasefire was a deliberate.
text_zh: ↩️ 回复黎巴嫩新闻与更新：“本周早些时候被炸毁的卡斯米耶-提尔（Qasmiye-Tyre）沿海大桥附近的当地居民，请求政府采取行动修复大桥，以便他们能回到提尔及周边地区的家中。这座昨天还能通行的大桥今天再次遭到猛烈轰炸……” ❗️ 有报道称，以色列命令黎巴嫩武装部队（LAF）和联合国驻黎巴嫩临时部队（UNIFIL）不得修复卡斯米耶大桥，并阻止居民过桥回家。毋庸置疑，以色列在停火前对其进行打击是蓄意的。

text: Trump lashes out at Tucker Carlson and Joe Kent.
text_zh: 特朗普抨击塔克·卡尔森（Tucker Carlson）和乔·肯特（Joe Kent）。

text: Nuno Felix RT @localteamit : Rapina a Napoli, il momento dell'irruzione dei Gis dei Carabinieri https://twitter.com/localteamit/status/2044794047005331676/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转推 @localteamit：那不勒斯发生抢劫案，宪兵特别干预组（Gis）突袭时刻 https://twitter.com/localteamit/status/2044794047005331676/video/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender Pictures published by USA Today show meals served recently to Sailors onboard the Nimitz-class aircraft carrier, USS Abraham Lincoln (CVN-72), as well as Marines serving on the USS Tripoli (LHA-7), an America-class amphibious assault ship, both of which are currently deployed to the Arabian Sea in order to enforce the ongoing naval blockade against coastal areas of Iran. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 《今日美国》发布的图片显示了最近在尼米兹级航空母舰“亚伯拉罕·林肯”号（USS Abraham Lincoln, CVN-72）上服役的水手，以及在美国级两栖攻击舰“的黎波里”号（USS Tripoli, LHA-7）上服役的海军陆战队员所食用的餐食，这两艘舰艇目前都部署在阿拉伯海，以执行针对伊朗沿海地区的持续海军封锁。推文

text: 🇱🇧 ⚡️ Residents of southern Lebanon have started going back to their homes 🚩 @RezistanceTrench1
text_zh: 🇱🇧 ⚡️ 黎巴嫩南部居民已开始返回家园 🚩 @RezistanceTrench1

text: Visioner ‼️ 🇺🇲 🇮🇷 BREAKING | Donald Trump stated that if an agreement with Iran is not reached, the fighting will continue. It is likely that the deal could collapse, in which case the United States may escalate to larger-scale bombing campaigns. In parallel, a ground operation could be launched targeting Iranian islands and ports in the Persian Gulf, including Kharg Island. In such a scenario, the U.S. would likely face higher casualties. However, if successful, it could effectively restrict China’s access to the Persian Gulf and use this leverage against China if necessary. See the latest updates with us: @visionergeo tweet
text_zh: Visioner ‼️ 🇺🇲 🇮🇷 快讯 | 唐纳德·特朗普表示，如果不能与伊朗达成协议，战斗将继续。该协议很可能会破裂，在这种情况下，美国可能会升级为更大规模的轰炸行动。与此同时，可能会发起针对波斯湾伊朗岛屿和港口（包括哈尔克岛）的地面行动。在这种情况下，美国可能会面临更大的伤亡。然而，如果成功，它可能会有效地限制中国进入波斯湾，并在必要时利用这一筹码对付中国。与我们一起查看最新动态：@visionergeo 推文

text: Open Source Intel RT @Osint613 : REPORTER: Iran is going to execute four more protesters, including the first woman protester. What do you tell Iran? TRUMP: Tell that to the Pope https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044842864174096505/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 转推 @Osint613：记者：伊朗将再处决四名抗议者，其中包括第一位女性抗议者。你对伊朗有什么想说的？特朗普：去跟教皇说吧 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044842864174096505/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel U.S. Navy is now in control. Audio recorded aboard the USS Michael Murphy (DDG 112), paired with aerial footage from its helicopter over the Gulf of Oman, captures a U.S. Navy diversion of a commercial vessel as part of enforcement on traffic to and from Iranian ports. Centcom says the operation will continue for as long as required. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 美国海军现已接管控制权。在“迈克尔·墨菲”号驱逐舰（USS Michael Murphy, DDG 112）上录制的音频，配合其直升机在阿曼湾上空的航拍画面，记录了美国海军作为执行进出伊朗港口交通管制的一部分，对一艘商船进行的拦截。中央司令部表示，该行动将根据需要持续进行。推文

text: OSINTdefender In the hours leading up to tonight’s ceasefire agreement between Israel and Hezbollah in Lebanon, both sides exchanged several attacks, with Hezbollah launching rockets into several populated areas of Northern Israel, while the Israeli Air Force carried out strikes on a number of launch sites and other Hezbollah-affiliated locations in Southern Lebanon. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 在今晚以色列与黎巴嫩真主党达成停火协议前的几个小时里，双方进行了多次交火，真主党向以色列北部的多个居民区发射了火箭弹，而以色列空军则对黎巴嫩南部的多个发射点和其他与真主党有关的地点进行了打击。推文

text: Nuno Felix https://x.com/thenews_fr/status/2044823136244277270/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix https://x.com/thenews_fr/status/2044823136244277270/video/1 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 An Israeli drone strike targeted a vehicle in the town of Haris, southern Lebanon. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇺🇳 🇮🇱 Reports that the UNIFIL and the Lebanese army have been informed by the IDF to not reopen/repair the Qasmiyeh bridge inorder to prevent civilians returning home particularly in the Litani area of southern Lebanon. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 一架以色列无人机袭击了黎巴嫩南部哈里斯（Haris）镇的一辆汽车。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇺🇳 🇮🇱 有报道称，联合国驻黎巴嫩临时部队（UNIFIL）和黎巴嫩军队已收到以色列国防军（IDF）的通知，不得重新开放或修复卡斯米耶大桥，以阻止平民返回家园，特别是黎巴嫩南部的利塔尼（Litani）地区。@wfwitness

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) RT @TankerTrackers : There are only five VLCC supertankers in the world which have that superstructure (and we have photographed many from shores), and all five are owned by the National Iranian Tanker Company. This looks like DEEP SEA (9218492) transporting 2 million barrels of Iranian crude. Audio 🔊 of a Sailor aboard USS Michael Murphy (DDG 112), with video from the guided-missile destroyer’s embarked helicopter flying over the Gulf of Oman, as the U.S. Navy diverts a merchant vessel while enforcing the blockade on ships entering or departing Iranian ports. U.S. forces are prepared to sustain the blockade as long as it takes. - U.S. Central Command tweet
text_zh: Status-6 (战争与军事新闻) 转推 @TankerTrackers：世界上只有五艘超大型油轮（VLCC）拥有这种上层建筑（我们从岸上拍摄过许多），这五艘全部归伊朗国家油轮公司所有。这看起来是“深海”号（DEEP SEA, 9218492）正在运输200万桶伊朗原油。音频🔊：一名在“迈克尔·墨菲”号驱逐舰（USS Michael Murphy, DDG 112）上的水手录制的音频，配有该导弹驱逐舰搭载的直升机在阿曼湾上空飞行的视频，记录了美国海军在执行对进出伊朗港口船只的封锁时拦截一艘商船的过程。美军准备维持封锁，直到达成目的。——美国中央司令部 推文

text: OSINTdefender The 10-day ceasefire between Israel and Hezbollah in Lebanon, mediated by the United States, is now in effect. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 由美国斡旋的以色列与黎巴嫩真主党之间为期10天的停火协议现已生效。推文

text: Open Source Intel The Department of Justice (DOJ) has opened an investigation into sexual assault allegations against former U.S. Rep. Eric Swalwell (D-CA), Fox News reports. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044897924765642850/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 据福克斯新闻报道，美国司法部（DOJ）已对前美国众议员埃里克·斯沃韦尔（Eric Swalwell, 加州民主党）的性侵指控展开调查。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044897924765642850/photo/1 推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @evanhill : Images of food being served to sailors on the USS Abraham Lincoln and USS Tripoli, published by USA Today. Supplies "are going to get really low" and "morale is going to be at an all-time low," one sailor messaged his mother: https://www.usatoday.com/story/news/politics/2026/04/16/iran-war-mail-packages-middle-east/89609308007/ https://twitter.com/evanhill/status/2044874837919739922/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转推 @evanhill：《今日美国》发布了“亚伯拉罕·林肯”号和“的黎波里”号上水手所食用的食物图片。一名水手给母亲发信息称，补给“将变得非常短缺”，“士气将降至历史最低点”：https://www.usatoday.com/story/news/politics/2026/04/16/iran-war-mail-packages-middle-east/89609308007/ https://twitter.com/evanhill/status/2044874837919739922/photo/1 推文

text: Meanwhile, while the streets are flooded with civilians cars, Israel issues a threat to Lebanese civilians about going back to their homes in the south. Israeli warplanes have been quiet since midnight according to local reports, but Israeli artillery shelling has been reported in Debbine, Khiam, and Bint Jbeil. We'll see how long this cautious peace lasts and how long it'll be before Hezbullah responds to the artillery violations.
text_zh: 与此同时，当街道上挤满了平民车辆时，以色列向黎巴嫩平民发出威胁，警告他们不要返回南部家园。据当地报道，以色列战机自午夜以来一直保持安静，但据报道，德宾（Debbine）、希亚姆（Khiam）和宾特朱拜勒（Bint Jbeil）遭到了以色列炮击。我们将拭目以待这种谨慎的和平能持续多久，以及真主党需要多久才会对炮击违规行为做出回应。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇱🇧 The citizens of Beirut have called on the Lebanese army to arrest and stop the individuals responsible for the reckless gunfire and B7’s in Dahieh with reports of damages across car windows and injuries within the capital. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 An Israeli drone strike targeted a vehicle in the town of Haris, southern Lebanon. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇱🇧 贝鲁特市民呼吁黎巴嫩军队逮捕并制止那些在达希耶（Dahieh）鲁莽开火和使用B7火箭筒的人，据报道首都多处汽车窗户受损并有人受伤。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 一架以色列无人机袭击了黎巴嫩南部哈里斯（Haris）镇的一辆汽车。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇺🇸🇮🇱 Heavy gunfire over Dahieh in celebration of the ceasefire agreement. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 The citizens of Beirut have called on the Lebanese army to arrest and stop the individuals responsible for the reckless gunfire and B7’s in Dahieh with reports of damages across car windows and injuries within the capital. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇺🇸🇮🇱 达希耶上空响起猛烈枪声，以庆祝停火协议。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 贝鲁特市民呼吁黎巴嫩军队逮捕并制止在达希耶进行鲁莽射击和使用B7火箭筒的人员，据报道，首都多处汽车车窗受损，并有人受伤。@wfwitness

text: Locals near the Qasmiye-Tyre costal bridge which was bombed earlier this week, ask the government to take action and repair the bridge so they could visit their homes in Tyre and nearby areas. The bridge, serviceable yesterday, was heavily bombed again today by Israel before the 10-day ceasefire was announced.
text_zh: 本周早些时候被轰炸的卡斯米耶-提尔（Qasmiye-Tyre）沿海大桥附近的当地居民，要求政府采取行动修复大桥，以便他们能够回到提尔及周边地区的家中。这座昨天还能通行的大桥，在10天停火协议宣布前，今天再次遭到以色列的猛烈轰炸。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧 The entrances of Dahieh have begun reopening as citizens return back home. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Footage from the entrance of the town of Ghazieh Southern Lebanon as residents return home. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧 随着市民返回家园，达希耶的入口已开始重新开放。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 黎巴嫩南部加齐耶（Ghazieh）镇入口处的画面，居民们正在返回家园。@wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 Nouraldin Aldaghir, Al Jazeera reporter in Tehran: From tomorrow, Bab el-Mandeb may enter the arena of pressure and counter-pressure between Tehran and Washington, increasing pressure on global trade and economy. The emergence of Bab el-Mandeb in the spotlight could be a response to Washington's efforts to blockade ports and is likely a mechanism to pressure the Iran-US negotiations. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench1
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 半岛电视台驻德黑兰记者努尔丁·阿尔达吉尔（Nouraldin Aldaghir）：从明天起，曼德海峡可能会进入德黑兰与华盛顿之间压力与反压力的博弈场，从而增加全球贸易和经济的压力。曼德海峡成为焦点可能是对华盛顿封锁港口努力的回应，很可能是一种向伊美谈判施压的机制。🚩 @RezistanceTrench1

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇮🇱🇱🇧 Looks like Israel managed to observe the ceasfire for about half an hour. Zionist artillery is now reportedly shelling the city of Bint Jbeil. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | Socials | Donate | Advertising" 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 Israeli Occupation Forces issued a warning to citizens of Southern Lebanon: Urgent message to the residents of southern Lebanon With the ceasefire agreement entering into force, the Israeli Defense Forces continue to maintain their positions in southern Lebanon in response to the ongoing terrorist activities of Hezbollah. For your safety and the safety of your families, and until further notice, you are requested not to move south of the Litani River. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇮🇱🇱🇧 看起来以色列只遵守了大约半小时的停火协议。据报道，犹太复国主义者的炮兵部队目前正在炮击宾特朱拜勒（Bint Jbeil）市。🔴 @DDGeopolitics | 社交媒体 | 捐赠 | 广告” 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 以色列占领军向黎巴嫩南部公民发出警告：致黎巴嫩南部居民的紧急信息：随着停火协议生效，以色列国防军为应对真主党持续的恐怖活动，将继续维持其在黎巴嫩南部的阵地。为了您和家人的安全，在另行通知之前，请勿前往利塔尼河（Litani River）以南地区。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Moments before the “ceasefire” came into effect a violent airstrike rocked the city of Tyre, southern Lebanon. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 在“停火”生效前夕，一场猛烈的空袭震动了黎巴嫩南部的提尔市。 @wfwitness

text: Western intelligence says Iran blunted the impact of US-Israeli strikes through pre-war planning. While it suffered heavy infrastructure damage and lost top leaders, it preserved key missile and drone capabilities and maintained command structures by quickly replacing officials. Iran also retains significant missile and drone reserves, suggesting it could still respond if fighting resumes. Source: Bloomberg
text_zh: 西方情报机构称，伊朗通过战前规划减轻了美以空袭的影响。虽然伊朗基础设施遭受重创并损失了高级领导人，但它通过迅速更换官员保留了关键的导弹和无人机能力，并维持了指挥结构。伊朗还保留了大量的导弹和无人机储备，这表明如果战斗恢复，它仍能做出回应。来源：彭博社
